data.body:
Re-evaluated against the codebase 2026-06-17 and independently re-verified by a second subagent (all 5 checks VERIFIED). Corrections applied to the description:
1. WU-1 rescoped: WORKFLOW_CONFIG_FILE is no longer live code — _display_mode (lookups.py:65) is now just load_config(repo_root).ticket.display_mode; only a comment at lookups.py:68 remains. Functional back-compat decision already made+implemented = DROPPED; WU-1 reduced to scrubbing that comment.
2. Removed stale MUST-NOT-TOUCH note for _read_config_value (function no longer exists).
3. WU-2 stale ref next_batch_files.py removed (file gone; only the 3 reconciler docstrings remain in src/).
4. Acceptance gate fixed: original gate (exclude only DSO-[0-9]) was UNSATISFIABLE — it flagged legitimate bare-'DSO' jira-project fixtures in test_config_loader/typed/show. New gate also exempts ["']DSO["'] and test_env_aliasing.py; added those bare-'DSO' fixtures to MUST NOT TOUCH.
Net: epic's cosmetic-cleanup thrust stands; it no longer overstates remaining functional work.
